title: jacea cineraria
intro: Jacea cineraria, also known as Wild Celery or Wild Lovage, is a perennial plant that belongs to the carrot family and is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Jacea cineraria include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Jacea cineraria can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
